tests.name: inline_if_true
tests.description: Inline if renders body when condition is true

tests.name: inline_if_false
tests.description: Inline if renders nothing when condition is false

tests.name: inline_if_else_true
tests.description: Inline if-else renders if-branch when true

tests.name: inline_if_else_false
tests.description: Inline if-else renders else-branch when false

tests.name: inline_elif_chain_first
tests.description: Inline elif chain renders first matching branch

tests.name: inline_elif_chain_second
tests.description: Inline elif chain renders second branch when matched

tests.name: inline_elif_chain_else
tests.description: Inline elif chain falls through to else

tests.name: inline_for_loop
tests.description: Inline for loop iterates over struct list

tests.name: for_else_empty_list
tests.description: For-else renders else body when list is empty
template_lines: > {% for item in items %}{{ item }}{% else %}empty{% /for %}

tests.name: for_else_nonempty_list
tests.description: For-else renders items when list is non-empty
template_lines: > {% for item in items %}{{ item }} {% else %}empty{% /for %}

tests.name: nested_inline_if_both_true
tests.description: Nested inline if renders when both conditions are true

tests.name: nested_inline_if_outer_true_inner_false
tests.description: Nested inline if — outer true, inner false

tests.name: nested_inline_if_outer_false
tests.description: Nested inline if — outer false skips everything

tests.name: text_around_inline_if_true
tests.description: Text before and after inline if — condition true

tests.name: text_around_inline_if_false
tests.description: Text before and after inline if — condition false

tests.name: inline_match_with_else_matched
tests.description: Inline match-else renders matched body when variant matches

tests.name: inline_match_with_else_unmatched
tests.description: Inline match-else renders else body when variant doesn't match

tests.name: unicode_in_inline_if
tests.description: Unicode content inside inline if renders correctly

tests.name: const_ref_as_param_default
tests.description: Const name used as param default resolves to const value

tests.name: filter_inside_inline_if_true
tests.description: Filter applied to expression inside inline if when true

tests.name: filter_inside_inline_if_false
tests.description: Filter inside inline if — condition false renders nothing

tests.name: filter_inside_inline_for
tests.description: Filter applied to expression inside inline for loop
template_lines: > {% for item in items %}{{ item.name | lower }} {% /for %}

tests.name: nested_inline_for
tests.description: Nested inline for loops iterate over nested lists
template_lines: > {% for group in groups %}[{% for item in group.items %}{{ item }}{% /for %}]{% /for %}

tests.name: inline_match_typed_enum_matched
tests.description: Inline match with typed enum — matched variant

tests.name: inline_match_typed_enum_unmatched
tests.description: Inline match with typed enum — unmatched falls to else

tests.name: multiple_inline_blocks_on_separate_lines
tests.description: Multiple blockquoted inline blocks on separate lines — no newline between

tests.name: inline_if_comparison_gt_positive
tests.description: Inline if with > comparison — positive result

tests.name: inline_if_comparison_gt_zero
tests.description: Inline if with > comparison — zero falls to else

tests.name: inline_if_eq_string_match
tests.description: Inline if with string equality — matched

tests.name: inline_if_eq_string_no_match
tests.description: Inline if with string equality — not matched falls to else

tests.name: inline_match_no_else_matched
tests.description: Inline match without else — matched renders body

tests.name: inline_match_no_else_unmatched
tests.description: Inline match without else — unmatched renders empty

tests.name: const_str_as_param_default
tests.description: String const used as param default resolves to const value

tests.name: const_str_default_overridden
tests.description: String const default can be overridden by caller

tests.name: const_bool_as_param_default
tests.description: Bool const used as param default resolves to const value

tests.name: const_bool_default_overridden
tests.description: Bool const default can be overridden by caller

tests.name: empty_inline_if_true
tests.description: Empty inline if body — true condition renders nothing extra

tests.name: empty_inline_if_false
tests.description: Empty inline if body — false condition also renders nothing

tests.name: for_loop_concat
tests.description: Inline for loop concatenates items without separator

tests.name: inline_tmpl_own_consts
tests.description: Inline template with its own consts renders them correctly

tests.name: join_filter_on_list
tests.description: Join filter concatenates list items with separator
